description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_doc job that runs apt-get update, apt-get -y install graphviz, echo '{\"allow_root\"'  ':'  true '}' > /root/.bowerrc, then ./gradlew codemidi:asciidoctor, and archives the generated HTML5 files from codemidi/build/asciidoc/html5 as artifacts, and runs only on the master branch. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on build_doc, creates a public directory, ensures the codemidi/build/asciidoc/html5 directory exists, copies its contents into public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, also only on master.
